channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ATLANTAELE] Atlanta Electricals Ltd Approves Conversion of Wholly Owned Subsidiary into Public Limited Company
item.description:
Atlanta Electricals Ltd announced that its Board of Directors has approved the proposal for conversion of Atlanta Trafo Private Limited, a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company, from a Private Limited Company into a Public Limited Company. The decision was made during the Board meeting held on 03rd March, 2026, which started at 09:00 a.m. and concluded at 09:30 a.m. The conversion is subject to necessary approvals and compliance with applicable regulations.

  • Atlanta Electricals Ltd Board approves conversion of Atlanta Trafo Private Limited from a Private to a Public Limited Company.
  • The conversion is subject to necessary approvals and compliance with applicable regulations.
  • The decision was made during the Board meeting held on 03rd March, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Atlanta Electricals Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [M&M] Mahindra bags biggest ever export order; 35,000 units of LCVs to be delivered to Indonesia in 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd. has announced that it will supply 35,000 units of Scorpio Pik Up vehicles in 2026 to Agrinas Pangan Nusantara, an Indonesian state-owned enterprise, for the Koperasi Desa/Kelurahan Merah Putih (KDKMP) Project. This partnership aims to enhance rural logistics and enable villages to become independent centers of economic growth. The Scorpio Pik Ups are known for their durability, payload capacity, and low operating costs, making them ideal for this project. This order is expected to significantly boost Mahindra's International Operations.

  • Mahindra has received an export order from Indonesia for 35,000 units of Scorpio Pik Up vehicles.
  • The order is worth a significant amount and is expected to boost Mahindra's International Operations.
  • The Scorpio Pik Ups are known for their durability, payload capacity, and low operating costs.
  • The vehicles will play a crucial role in enhancing logistics for Koperasi being set up in Indonesia.
  • The partnership aims to bridge the gap between producers and consumers, thereby enhancing rural logistics.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAHINDRA & MAHINDRA LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [VMM] Vishal Mega Mart Ltd Grants 5,00,000 Stock Options Under Employees Stock Options Plan 2019
item.description:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd has approved the grant of 5,00,000 stock options to eligible employees under the Vishal Mega Mart Employees Stock Options Plan 2019. The exercise price is set at Rs. 117/- per option. Each stock option is convertible into one fully paid-up equity share having a face value of Rs. 10 each. The exercise period to exercise the vested options is 10 (ten) years from the date of grant of options.

  • Vishal Mega Mart Ltd grants 5,00,000 stock options
  • Grant under Vishal Mega Mart Employees Stock Options Plan 2019
  • Exercise price set at Rs. 117/- per option
  • Each stock option convertible into one equity share
  • Exercise period of 10 years from date of grant

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd | Category: ESOP

item.title: [GREENPLY] Greenply Industries Ltd: Income Tax Department Conducts Search and Seizure
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Greenply Industries Limited has informed the exchange about a Search and Seizure conducted by the Income Tax Department at the company's registered office, manufacturing unit, and the residence of a promoter and few executives. The action also included the manufacturing unit of Greenply Sandila Private Limited. The Search and Seizure commenced on 26th February 2026 and concluded in the late evening on 02nd March 2026. The company has cooperated fully with the authorities and responded to the clarifications and details sought by them. The business operations of the company continued without any disruption. The company will continue to make disclosures in compliance with the SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015.

  • Income Tax Department conducts Search and Seizure at Greenply Industries Limited's registered office and manufacturing unit.
  • The action also included the manufacturing unit of Greenply Sandila Private Limited and the residence of a promoter and few executives.
  • The Search and Seizure commenced on 26th February 2026 and concluded in the late evening on 02nd March 2026.
  • The company has cooperated fully with the authorities and responded to their queries.
  • The business operations of the company continued without any disruption.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GREENPLY INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [BRITANNIA] Britannia Industries Receives Order from CGST & Central Excise Office for Tax Non-Payment of Rs. 6,37,20,000
item.description:
Britannia Industries Ltd. has received an Order from the Office of the Commissioner of CGST & Central Excise, Thane, under Section 74 of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017. The Order alleges non-payment of tax due to incorrect classification of goods supplied for FY 2020-21 to FY 2023-24. The tax and penalty quantified in the Order amounts to Rs. 6,37,20,000/- including applicable interest. The Company mentioned that there is no material impact on the financials, operations, or other activities. The Order is appealable, and the Company will take necessary actions including exercising legal remedies available under the GST law.

  • Britannia Industries received an Order from the Office of the Commissioner of CGST & Central Excise, Thane.
  • The Order was issued under Section 74 of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017.
  • The Order alleges non-payment of tax due to incorrect classification of goods supplied for FY 2020-21 to FY 2023-24.
  • The tax and penalty quantified in the Order amounts to Rs. 6,37,20,000/- including applicable interest.
  • The Company will take necessary actions including exercising legal remedies available under the GST law.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BRITANNIA INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [ICICIAMC] SEBI Approves Change in Control of ICICI Ventures Funds Management Company Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Ltd has received an email from ICICI Ventures Funds Management Company Limited informing about the receipt of a letter dated March 2, 2026 from Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) approving the change in control of the investment manager and sponsor of certain Category Il Alternative Investment Funds (AIF) schemes. The approval is valid for a period of six months and is subject to payment of fees as applicable under SEBI (Alternative Investment Funds) Regulations, 2012.

  • SEBI approves change in control of ICICI Ventures Funds Management Company Limited
  • Approval is valid for a period of six months and subject to payment of fees as applicable
  • ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Ltd to take suitable action in discussion with ICICI Ventures Funds Management Company Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GREENPANEL] Greenpanel Industries Ltd: Income Tax Department Conducts Search Proceedings
item.description:
Greenpanel Industries Limited, a leading company in the industry, has informed the exchange about the search proceedings conducted by the Income Tax Department at its registered office, other offices, plant locations, and the residence of the Promoter and an ex-employee. The search commenced on February 26, 2026, and concluded on March 2, 2026. The company has fully cooperated with the Income Tax authorities during the course of the proceedings.

  • Income Tax Department conducted search proceedings at the registered office, other offices, plant locations of the Company, and at the residence of the Promoter and an ex-employee.
  • The search commenced at 6.25 A.M. on February 26, 2026 and concluded at 7:00 P.M. on March 2, 2026.
  • Certain books of accounts, documents, and digital data were seized during the search proceedings.
  • The company has fully cooperated with the Income Tax authorities during the course of the proceedings.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Greenpanel Industries Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [GRNLAMIND] Greenlam Industries Ltd: Income Tax Department Conducts Search Under IT Act
item.description:
Greenlam Industries Ltd announced that the Income Tax Department conducted a search under the Income Tax Act, 1961 at the Registered Office of the Company and its subsidiary Greenlam Limited and also at two Manufacturing Units of the Company. The Company fully cooperated with the officials of the Department and responded to the clarifications and details sought by them. The business operations of the Company continued without any disruption despite the search. The Company will comply with its legal obligation for further disclosure in this regard.

  • Income Tax Department conducted a search under the Income Tax Act, 1961 at Greenlam Industries Ltd and its subsidiary
  • Search also conducted at two Manufacturing Units of the Company
  • Company cooperated fully with the officials of the Department
  • Company responded to the clarifications and details sought by the Department
  • Business operations of the Company continued without any disruption despite the search

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Greenlam Industries Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Subsidiary Executes 450 MW Power Purchase Agreements with SJVN Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACME Greentech Seventh Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of ACME Solar Holdings Limited, has executed two Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) with SJVN Limited for contract capacities of 300 MW and 150 MW, totaling 450 MW under a Firm and Dispatchable Renewable Energy (FDRE) Power Project. The project has a scheduled commencement of supply date on 01.03.2028 with a 25-year tenure from the date of SCSD. The tariff for the project is set at Rs. 6.74 per unit.

  • ACME Greentech Seventh Private Limited executes PPAs with SJVN Limited for 450 MW FDRE Power Project
  • Project scheduled to commence supply on 01.03.2028 with a 25-year tenure
  • Tariff for the project is set at Rs. 6.74 per unit
  • ACME Solar Holdings Limited is the parent company of the subsidiary executing the agreements

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [RRKABEL] R R Kabel Ltd Appoints Mrs. Kamaljeet Kaur as Chief Human Resource Officer
item.description:
R R Kabel Ltd has appointed Mrs. Kamaljeet Kaur as the Chief Human Resource Officer designated as Senior Management Personnel, with effect from 9 March 2026. Mrs. Kaur holds a Bachelor of Arts degree with Honors in Economics and a Post Graduate Diploma in Management with specialization in Human Resource Management. She brings over 22 years of extensive and diverse experience across various sectors. She has been responsible for leading and driving Strategic HR and organizational transformation, developing leadership capacities and capabilities, digital HR and building high-performing teams.

  • Appointment of Mrs. Kamaljeet Kaur as Chief Human Resource Officer
  • Mrs. Kaur's extensive experience of over 22 years in various sectors
  • Her expertise in corporate and plant-level HR, Industrial Relations and Administration
  • Her role in leading and driving Strategic HR and organizational transformation
  • Her responsibility in developing leadership capacities and capabilities, digital HR and building high-performing teams

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: R R Kabel Ltd | Category: Management Change
